hero_description: I'm very enthusiastic about the world of web programming to cross-platform. Tools I love when building a website include:
hero_tools: Node.JS, Javascript, Typescript, .NET, C#, Mysql, Sql Server
about_intro: My journey in the world of technology and software development.
about_start_content: I am a graduate of STMIK Palcomtech (ITB Palcomtech) majoring in Information Systems (S1) from 2017-2021 with a GPA of 3.67. I first started learning web programming with PHP and MySQL, then from PHP I learned about a framework for PHP called Laravel. With Laravel I once got a freelance job creating a Company Profile website for PT. Ginting Jaya Energy.
about_college_content: After completing my thesis, I had some free time to create projects for myself. Starting from watching YouTube videos about creating and publishing APIs on RapidAPI, I tried to create one of my API projects, Top Hashtags Instagram, using Node JS and Express JS, then I changed it to Sveltekit over time and I am now ready to use it in my projects.
about_work_p1: After graduating and having my commencement in 2021, thank God I didn't have to wait long to get a job. At that time, I was accepted at PT. Astra Motor Palembang (Honda Motor Sumsel) as a CRM Admin.
about_work_p2: My main job as a CRM Admin was to recap sales and service data for all motorbikes in South Sumatra using Excel to be used as leads so that consumers would return for retention.
about_work_p3: After working as a CRM Admin for 1 year, thank God in 2022 I got the job I wanted, which was to become a Web Programmer at PT. Ciptapapan Dinamika. Here I needed to deepen my knowledge again because I had never used C#, .NET Core, and SQL Server. Since C# and TypeScript are similar but not the same, I was able to adapt well; perhaps what I needed to understand were the different concepts between .NET and Node JS.
project_intro: A collection of projects I've worked on, both open-source and professional.
resume_summary: Experienced Fullstack Developer with expertise in the .NET and TypeScript ecosystems. Proven success in transforming business requirements into scalable ERP systems. Focused on code performance, microservices architecture, and intuitive UI.
resume_exp_ciptapapan_desc: Responsible for the development and maintenance of the company's ERP system using ASP.NET, SQL Server, and .NET Core-based Microservices. Managed cron jobs with Hangfire and API integration.
resume_exp_astra_desc: Managed the consumer database for Honda South Sumatra, performing data processing using Excel for retention strategies and lead generation.
resume_exp_freelance_desc: Developed a Company Profile website for PT. Ginting Jaya Energi using Laravel and MySQL.
resume_edu_desc: Graduated with a GPA of 3.67. Focused on information system development and web technology.
project_gje_desc: Company profile website for PT. Ginting Jaya Energy built with PHP, Laravel, Bootstrap, JavaScript, and MySQL.
project_tophashtags_desc: A public API that can be used by all developers in need and I published it to RapidAPI, built with Node JS, SvelteKit.
project_erp_desc: Creating new modules and maintaining the ERP system with ASP.NET, SQL Server, Crystal Report, REST API, JavaScript technology.
project_formatter_desc: Personal project to facilitate my daily work with Node JS, SvelteKit, Bootstrap, Vercel, GitHub technology.
project_microservices_desc: Creating new endpoints and maintaining the company's Microservices with .NET Core, SQL Server, REST API, Linq, EFCore technology.
project_hangfire_desc: Creating new jobs and maintaining all hangfire jobs with ASP.NET, SQL Server, REST API, Linq, EFCore, Hangfire technology.
project_portofolio_desc: Portfolio website for myself with Node JS, SvelteKit, Shadcn, Tailwind CSS, GitHub technology.
project_nik_desc: A public API that can be used by all developers in need and I published it to RapidAPI, built with Node JS, SvelteKit.
project_sky_desc: A public API for website scraping by checking robots.txt/ToS and producing JSON output, published to RapidAPI, built with Node JS, SvelteKit.
project_tophashtags_app_desc: Mobile application to search for popular hashtags on Instagram. Available on Google Play Store, built with Flutter, Dart, RapidAPI.
project_validator_desc: All-in-one validator API for validating various data inputs.
